limitation: Public data is aggregated/anonymized. No single-underlier queries possible via EMIR.
best_source_for_gme: SEC SBSR via DTCC SDR (since Feb 2022). UPI codes for GME swaps first assigned April 2024.
key_finding: European EMIR data would only show aggregate equity swap volume, not GME-specific. The US SBSR is the relevant regime for security-based equity swaps on US underliers.
